name: small business owners using Gusto for payroll processing 5–15 employees tool
description: For small business owners using Gusto for payroll processing 5–15 employees, manual payroll entry causes late tax filings. We automate payroll inputs and tax filing instead of manual payroll processing and tax filing.

problem_solved: manual payroll entry and tax filing
